lessons: Bow users (Ranger, Deadeye) killed you in 2/10 recent rounds — avoid open-field duels; use cover and lateral movement to break line of sight.
Shield users (Fortress, HexMind) appeared in 8/10 recent rounds with >100 weapon sightings — never engage head-on; wait for shield cooldown or flank from side/rear.
Sword users (Lancer, Valkyrie, Juggernaut, Warden) made up 8/9 of your kills — prioritize them aggressively; bow headshots are lethal at medium range, especially when they're moving.
Hook (grapple) killed you in 4 of last 6 rounds (275, 280, 281, 284) — retreat immediately on sight; grapple closes distance faster than bow range and ignores terrain.
Double_bounty modifier produced your best performance (5 kills, 0 deaths) — actively seek and camp this modifier; it massively favors bow dominance against sword users.
Staff users (NeuralReaper, HexMind) killed you in 2 recent rounds — keep moving unpredictably; their damage is high but slow to aim, making them vulnerable in open areas with erratic movement.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow remains the highest-performing weapon in both win rate (19/114) and kill efficiency, especially under double_bounty and against sword users.
